description:
Index Of String is a ProtoFlux node that gives a index of where a string occurs in another string. 

The output is at where it starts.

fields.Str: The string to search for Part (String) in.
fields.Part: The string to look for inside of Str (String). Returns ``-1`` if not found.
fields.StartIndex: The position after which to start searching. Default ``0``.
fields.SearchFromEnd: Whether this should start searching from the end rather than the beginning after StartIndex (int).
fields.* ([[Type:Int|int]]): The index where Part (String) first occurs after StartIndex (int) in Str (String). The number returned is at where the occurrence starts.
